title: Pleomele tholloniana
taxonomy: Pleomele tholloniana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This family is a group of monocotyledonous flowering plants that are commonly known as the asparagus family. The genus Pleomele is a group of tropical plants native to the Pacific Islands and Australia. The classification of Pleomele tholloniana reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Asparagaceae family.
